# Claude Code + NotebookLM + Obsidian Research Stack

*Mind map generated by NotebookLM — full architecture overview*

## Core Components

### Claude Code
- **CLI Agent** — command-line AI that reads/writes files
- **Local File Access** — direct filesystem access to vault
- **Task Execution** — runs scripts, automates workflows

### NotebookLM
- **Grounded Citations** — answers tied to source material, not hallucinated
- **300 Source Capacity** — can ingest up to 300 documents per notebook
- **Hallucination Reduction** — responses grounded in uploaded sources only

### Obsidian
- **Unified Context** — single place for all knowledge
- **Knowledge Graph** — visual relationships between entities
- **Local Markdown Files** — portable, AI-readable, future-proof

## Workflow Capabilities

### Research Automation
- **YouTube Transcript Analysis** — extract insights from videos
- **Scientific Paper Synthesis** — summarize academic research
- **Competitive Market Research** — analyze competitor data

### Personal Assistant
- **Morning/Evening Routines** — daily briefings and reviews
- **Calendar & Task Sync** — integrated scheduling
- **Telegram/Mobile Integration** — access from anywhere

### Content Generation
- **Audio Overviews (Podcasts)** — NotebookLM generates audio summaries
- **Flashcards (Anki)** — knowledge retention
- **Mind Maps & Diagrams** — visual knowledge representation

## Technical Patterns

### Context Management
- **Claude.md Memory File** — persistent context for AI agent (like our MEMORY.md!)
- **Session Hand-offs** — maintain context between sessions
- **Metadata Frontmatter Filtering** — AI reads only relevant files based on YAML

### Skill Architecture
- **Custom CLI Skills** — teach agent new capabilities
- **Progressive Disclosure** — agent learns vault structure incrementally
- **Obsidian CLI Commands** — programmatic vault management

### Retrieval Layer
- **Semantic Search (QMD)** — meaning-based search, not just keywords
- **Vector/BM25 Hybrid Search** — combining semantic + keyword search
- **Vault Health Audits** — check for broken links, orphan notes, stale data

## Key Benefits
- **Time Efficiency** — 146 hours saved (their metric)
- **Persistent Personal Context** — AI knows your business without re-explaining
- **Privacy & Local Data Ownership** — your data stays on your machine
- **No Re-explaining Life to AI** — context carries over between sessions

---

## 💡 Takeaways for DECA

### What Maps Directly to Us
| Their Concept | Our Equivalent |
|--------------|----------------|
| Claude Code CLI Agent | Klawdiy (OpenClaw) |
| Claude.md Memory File | MEMORY.md + SOUL.md |
| Session Hand-offs | OpenClaw session continuity |
| Morning/Evening Routines | Our 8AM/6PM sales briefings |
| Telegram/Mobile Integration | Already built! |
| Local Markdown Files | Obsidian vault we're designing |

### New Ideas Worth Exploring
1. **NotebookLM as research layer** — load 300 sources (Gealan PDFs, competitor sites, sales transcripts) → grounded answers about products
2. **Semantic Search (QMD)** — instead of keyword search, find "customers worried about price" across all notes
3. **Vault Health Audits** — automated check for orphan customers, broken links, stale deals
4. **Progressive Disclosure** — agent doesn't load entire vault, discovers what it needs
5. **Metadata Frontmatter Filtering** — YAML properties let agent query "all hot deals" or "all Eric's customers" without reading every file
6. **Audio Overviews** — NotebookLM could generate daily podcast-style sales briefing from vault data
